tagline: Enjoy stress-free pool ownership with a service and maintenance team you can count on

hero.headline: Madison's Most Trusted Pool Care Team
hero.subheadline: With lead technicians carrying 10-30 years of Wisconsin pool experience, New Wave Pools keeps your water crystal clear so you can enjoy every warm day. Award-winning service, a year-long warranty, and fully stocked trucks that fix it on the first visit.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Southern Wisconsin
services.subtitle: From seasonal openings to emergency repairs, our PHTA-certified technicians handle every aspect of pool and hot tub ownership so you can simply enjoy the water.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal preparation done right. We get your pool summer-ready and winterized with care, protecting your investment through every Wisconsin season.

cards.title: Pool & Hot Tub Maintenance
cards.description: Flexible daily, weekly, or bi-weekly programs with digital water chemistry tracking through your personal customer portal. Always know your pool's status.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Expert measurement, precision fitting, and professional installation backed by our year-long workmanship warranty. Free estimates on every liner job.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Heaters, pumps, filters, salt systems, and automation — diagnosed and fixed fast. Our fully stocked trucks complete most repairs in a single visit.

cards.title: Auto Cover Services
cards.description: Installation, maintenance, and repair of automatic pool covers for enhanced safety, reduced energy costs, and a cleaner pool year-round.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Comprehensive programs for public pools, swim facilities, and water parks. Opening/closing, ongoing maintenance, water quality compliance, and equipment servicing.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll schedule a free on-site inspection and provide an honest, no-pressure estimate within 24 hours. No contracts required.

steps.title: We Show Up & Handle It All
steps.description: Our award-winning technicians arrive on schedule with fully stocked vehicles. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, repairs — handled in one visit whenever possible.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy the Water
steps.description: Track your service history and water chemistry through our digital portal. Your pool stays pristine and swim-ready — backed by our year-long workmanship warranty.

about.label: Why Madison Trusts New Wave
about.headline: 13 Years of Award-Winning Pool Care in Southern Wisconsin
about.description: New Wave Pools has been locally owned and operated in the greater Madison area since 2013. Our lead technicians bring 10 to 30 years of hands-on experience, and every team member meets continuing education requirements. We're proud PHTA members, multiple-time Guildmaster Honor recipients, and Superior Service Award winners. When we pull up to your property, our trucks are fully stocked — because we believe in fixing it right the first time.

features.title: Award-Winning Technicians
features.description: Our team has earned the Guildmaster Honor for Service Excellence and Superior Service Awards five years running. Experience you can trust.

features.title: Year-Long Workmanship Warranty
features.description: Every service we perform is backed by a full year warranty. If something isn't right, we come back and make it right — no questions asked.

features.title: Digital Customer Portal
features.description: Track your service history, water chemistry results, and upcoming appointments online. Full transparency, no surprises, complete peace of mind.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Flexible scheduling, honest estimates, and no hidden fees — ever.

guarantee.headline: Our Year-Long Workmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every service we perform is backed by a full year workmanship warranty. If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll return and make it right at no additional cost. That's been our promise since 2013, and it's why Madison pool owners keep coming back.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within one week. For urgent equipment failures or water quality issues, we offer priority response. Call us at 608-444-8850 and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: No contracts required. We offer flexible service agreements because we believe in earning your business with every single visit. You can adjust or cancel your service plan anytime.

faqs.question: What certifications do your technicians hold?
faqs.answer: Our team holds PHTA (Pool & Hot Tub Alliance) and NSPF (National Swimming Pool Foundation) certifications. All technicians meet ongoing continuing education requirements and carry full insurance.

faqs.question: Can you service commercial pools and water parks?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide comprehensive commercial programs including opening/closing, ongoing maintenance, water quality compliance support, and full equipment servicing for public pools, swim facilities, and water parks.

faqs.question: What areas in Wisconsin do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Madison area including Sun Prairie, Middleton, Verona, Cottage Grove, Stoughton, Lake Mills, Chenequa, and communities throughout Southern Wisconsin.

testimonials.name: Amanda K.
testimonials.text: Prompt, efficient, reasonable, and professional. We have used a lot of pool companies and they are the best! Highly recommend New Wave to anyone in the Madison area.

testimonials.name: Larry T.
testimonials.text: We called every pool place in greater Madison. None even called us back. Except New Wave — we were very relieved. They've been taking great care of our pool ever since.

testimonials.name: Jack H.
testimonials.text: Come exactly when scheduled, never overcharge. Employees are top notch and extremely professional. New Wave is the only pool company we'll ever use.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure estimate from Madison's award-winning pool team. No contracts, no commitments — just honest service backed by a year-long warranty.
benefits: Free on-site pool inspection with every estimate
